creator: nmh@t3x.org
text:
Hi,

On Wed, Nov 08, 2006 at 03:50:45PM +0800, Rong-En Fan wrote:
> It does not build:
> 
> http://www.rafan.org/tb/errors/6-FreeBSD/sketchy-20061107.log
> awk version problem?

yes, indeed. GNU awk is the default on 4.9. I finally threw it
out and linked nawk to awk. The port should build now. New diff
follows below.

I have also removed USE_REINPLACE. Will put it into make.conf.
Thanks for the hint!

Regards, Nils

>Fix:
diff -ru lang/sketchy-old/Makefile lang/sketchy/Makefile
--- lang/sketchy-old/Makefile	Tue Oct 31 09:06:14 2006
+++ lang/sketchy/Makefile	Wed Nov  8 09:18:14 2006
@@ -6,7 +6,7 @@
 #
 
 PORTNAME=	sketchy
-PORTVERSION=	20061023
+PORTVERSION=	20061108
 CATEGORIES=	lang devel lisp scheme
 MASTER_SITES=	http://www.t3x.org/files/
 
diff -ru lang/sketchy-old/distinfo lang/sketchy/distinfo
--- lang/sketchy-old/distinfo	Tue Oct 31 09:06:14 2006
+++ lang/sketchy/distinfo	Wed Nov  8 09:18:14 2006

-SHA256 (sketchy-20061023.tar.gz) = f38a6e2875e5083eda24c69493aaa902222f0142db32a89a901575519687498c
